market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this spacious 2-bedroom, 3-bed apartment perfectly suited for 4 guests. Located in [specific neighborhood/district], this entire home offers a comfortable retreat just minutes from [nearest landmark/transportation]. Enjoy the convenience of a private free parking space on-site, eliminating the stress of urban car searches. The apartment features [natural light from large windows/a modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances/guests consistently praise the building's secure access]. With a 5.0 rating in just 13 reviews, guests love [specific feature from reviews - e.g., 'easy access to nearby attractions' or 'quiet neighborhood vibe']. Ideal for short stays or weekend getaways, this high-end listing maintains exceptional standards with regular check-ins and housekeeping. While we recommend a minimum price of £248/night (aligned with the 42% premium over the city median), our occupancy rate could improve with strategic optimizations to make the property's unique features even more discoverable to price-appropriate travelers.
top_amenity_gaps: Parking and facilities (free parking in title needs explicit amenity tagging)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the parking space visual - it's the strongest differentiator and should be first photo to immediately address city travelers' common pain point of parking stress
key_diagnosis: £248.4 rate is +42% above £175 median but occupancy is -47% below 28.3% cohort average
No description content at all - 0/10 score is extreme for missing core information
Free parking in title but not listed as official amenity - this key differentiator is under-optimized
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £248/night rate is 42% above median but occupancy is 47% below market average across 76 open nights - let's optimize to convert that premium positioning into full occupancy
